props.ChoiceText: You discovered that the safest prisoner is sometimes the one no one quite notices from one day to the next.
props.ChoiceBio: Learning to vanish in routine taught you the stealth of boredom, obedience, and exact timing.

0.TransitionText: Because learning to vanish in routine taught you the stealth of boredom, obedience, and exact timing, prison itself remained your world.

1.TransitionText: Because learning to vanish in routine taught you the stealth of boredom, obedience, and exact timing, prison sharpened the instincts criminal life rewards.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because learning to vanish in routine taught you the stealth of boredom, obedience, and exact timing, concealment became a weapon rather than a habit.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Assassin, but you may remain on your current path instead.
